notes: Fun fact: Tanzania has the highest point in Africa (Kilimanjaro at 5,895m) and borders the deepest lake in Africa (Lake Tanganyika at 1,470m deep). The country spans extremes.
highlights: Liked: The Swahili coast culture is distinct and rich. Dar es Salaam has an energy that is different from Nairobi: slower, warmer, more coastal.
Did not like: Bureaucracy moves at its own pace. Patience is not a suggestion, it is a survival skill.
